package rulefixtures

// scenario for template_parse_in_hot_path: html/template or text/template parse calls observed on request-style paths instead of startup-time caching.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule370NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario370Negative(records []Rule370NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
